meanings.definition: the pursuit (of a person or animal) by following tracks or marks they left behind

examples: But in so many other areas we still are dragging

meanings.definition: go after with the intent to catch
examples: The policeman chased the mugger down the alley

meanings.definition: move, proceed, or walk draggingly or slowly
examples: John trailed behind his class mates
The Mercedes trailed behind the horse cart

meanings.definition: hang down so as to drag along the ground
examples: The bride's veiled trailed along the ground

meanings.definition: drag loosely along a surface; allow to sweep the ground
examples: The toddler was trailing his pants
She trained her long scarf behind her
